response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and notable employers (Google, Meta), with demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, or statistical analysis — core requirements for this Principal IC6 role. Seniority level (Senior/Staff) and lack of platform-building track record for cross-team measurement systems are gaps for a Principal-level position focused specifically on growth/experimentation systems.
strengths: 13+ years of engineering experience across multiple languages matching the JD's stack (JS/TS, C/C++, Java, C#, Python-adjacent)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development) and demonstrated mentorship via workshops/talks
High-scale production experience (Sociomantic millions of HTTP req/sec; Meta direct mail at millions/year)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, or rollout-risk management — the core of this role
No evidence of statistical analysis, metrics infrastructure, or bias detection work required for measurement platforms
Title trajectory is Senior/Staff; Principal/IC6 typically requires demonstrated cross-org platform leadership not visible in the resume
